title: CottageCraft
description: A Cottage-core building themed pack, designed to expand the game with more creatures, biomes and blocks
body:
# CottageCraft Modpack
CottageCraft is a modpack designed to keep close to vanilla but also massively improve it in many ways by sticking to a cottage-core theme, adding a lot more building blocks and variants, new biomes & structures as well as many new cute creatures.

This modpack contains 2 completely custom made mods, adding lots of coloured variants of blocks which can also be found separately [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cottagecraft-mod) as well as adding lots of [Axolotl Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/cottagecraft-axolotls) with textures based on game content & the players of the [CottageCraft SMP](https://linktr.ee/cottagecraftmc)

<details>
<summary>Install Instructions</summary>

1. Download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) (or Instance Launcher like ATLauncher, MultiMC or Prism Launcher)
2. Search for the Modpack on Modrinth App & Click Install (or download the .mrpack and import into Instance Launcher)
3. Set your Java Memory (RAM) to 4024(4gb) or 8138(8gb) recommended for smooth gameplay

See Modrinth FAQ about adding extra mods - https://docs.modrinth.com/faq/app/unpair

*CurseForge Launcher not supported*
</details>

![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WIuaHfVa/images/4dea79eabcc82770f987b2056c39166480cac2a8.png)
